task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Rate-Limited API** (Level 7)

Build any CRUD API with rate limiting. POST /api/items creates items (name required). GET /api/items lists all. Apply rate limiting: max 5 requests per minute. The 6th request within a minute should return 429.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Items table:
  name, required

# Your endpoints here
# Hint: rate limit 5 per minute

```

The app must pass these HTTP tests:
  - POST /api/items with body {"name
final_source:
build for javascript backend

database is local memory

create a Items table:
  name, required

create a RateLimit table:
  timestamp

when user calls POST /api/items sending item_data:
  validate item_data:
    name must not be empty
  
  # Check rate limit
  recent = get every RateLimit where timestamp is not empty
  
  if length of recent is greater than 5:
    send back 'Too Many Requests' with status 429
  
  # Log this request
  log_entry is an empty list
  now_time = current time
  log_entry's timestamp is now_time
  save log_entry as new RateLimit
  
  # Save the item
  saved = save item_data to Items
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/items:
  # Check rate limit
  recent = get every RateLimit where timestamp is not empty
  
  if length of recent is greater than 5:
    send back 'Too Many Requests' with status 429
  
  # Log this request
  log_entry is an empty list
  now_time = current time
  log_entry's timestamp is now_time
  save log_entry as new RateLimit
  
  items = get all Items
  send back items
